```csharp
// BenchmarkRunner.cs
public sealed class BenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _modelLock = new(1, 1);
    private readonly List<BenchmarkContext> _queue = new();
    private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();
    private readonly ILogger _logger = new();

    public async Task RunAsync(IEnumerable<BenchmarkContext> contexts)
    {
        foreach (var ctx in contexts) _queue.Add(ctx);
        await Task.Run(async () =>
        {
            while (_queue.Count > 0 || !_cts.IsCancellationRequested)
            {
                if (_queue.Count == 0) await Task.Delay(100, _cts.Token);
                var ctx = _queue.Dequeue();
                await _modelLock.WaitAsync(_cts.Token);
                try
                {
                    await RunSingle(ctx);
                }
                finally { _modelLock.Release(); }
            }
        });
    }

    private async Task RunSingle(BenchmarkContext ctx)
    {
        try
        {
            var metrics = await InvokeModel(ctx);
            var score = ctx.Score(metrics);
            _logger.LogInformation("{Model} scored {Score}", ctx.Model, score);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger.LogError(ex, "{Model} failed", ctx.Model);
        }
    }

    private async Task<double[]> InvokeModel(BenchmarkContext ctx)
    {
        // Serialize heavy model server access
        await _modelLock.WaitAsync();
        try
        {
            // Execute benchmark logic
            return await Task.FromResult(new double[] { 0.95 });
        }
        finally { _modelLock.Release(); }
    }
}
```
